privileged_info_summary: The task creates a 4-slide presentation from a text outline about moral philosophy. The source file is created synthetically during setup at /home/ga/Documents/TaskData/ethics_lecture_outline.txt with structured content containing 4 main sections: Foundations of Moral Philosophy, Utilitarianism, Deontology, and Virtue Ethics. Each section contains specific bullet points with named philosophers and concepts. The Utilitarianism section includes Bentham, Mill, and references to happiness principles. The Deontology section references Kant, Categorical Imperative, and duty-based ethics. The Virtue Ethics section mentions Aristotle, Eudaimonia, and the Golden Mean. The output is expected to be saved as an ODP file at /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/ethics_lecture.odp.
